evals.name: wasm-server-adoption
evals.prompt: Write a research report on the current state of WebAssembly adoption in server-side applications
evals.expected_output: A 3000-5000 word basic research report with inline citations covering WASI, edge computing, major runtime implementations, and adoption drivers/barriers
expectations: A report.md file exists in the output directory
The report is at least 2500 words long
The report contains at least 5 inline citations with source URLs
At least 3 sub-question entity files were created
At least 5 unique source entity files were created
The execution log shows all phases completed successfully
The report covers WASI or WebAssembly System Interface

evals.name: european-streaming-competition
evals.prompt: Research how European streaming platforms are competing with Netflix in 2025 — market share, content strategy, and regulatory advantages
evals.expected_output: A 3000-5000 word basic research report with inline citations covering key European platforms, EU content quotas, market share data, and competitive strategies
expectations: A report.md file exists in the output directory
The report is at least 2500 words long
The report contains at least 5 inline citations with source URLs
At least 3 sub-question entity files were created
At least 5 unique source entity files were created
The execution log shows all phases completed successfully
The report mentions at least 2 specific European streaming platforms by name

evals.name: intermittent-fasting-metabolic
evals.prompt: Write a research report on the latest evidence for intermittent fasting effects on metabolic health
evals.expected_output: A 3000-5000 word basic research report with inline citations covering recent clinical trials, metabolic biomarkers, different IF protocols, and evidence quality assessment
expectations: A report.md file exists in the output directory
The report is at least 2500 words long
The report contains at least 5 inline citations with source URLs
At least 3 sub-question entity files were created
At least 5 unique source entity files were created
The execution log shows all phases completed successfully
The report discusses at least 2 different IF protocols (e.g., 16:8, 5:2, alternate-day)
